rules.description:
At the start of the battle round, you can select one of the bullet points below. If you do, until the start of the next battle round, that bullet point’s effects apply.

- Each time an ^^**Adeptus Custodes^^** model from your army with the Martial Ka'tah ability makes a melee attack, a successful unmodified attack roll of 5+ scores a Critical Hit.
- Improve the Armour Penetration characteristic of melee weapons equipped by ^^**Adeptus Custodes^^** models from your army with the Martial Ka'tah ability by 1.
rules.name: Martial Mastery

rules.description:
^^**Anathema Psykana^^** units from your army gain the following ability:
**Null Aegis (Aura)**: While an ^^**Adeptus Custodes^^** unit is within 6" of this unit, models in that unit have the Feel No Pain 5+ ability against Psychic Attacks and mortal wounds.


All other **^^Adeptus Custodes**^^ units from your army gain the following ability:
**Deadly Unity (Aura)**: While an **^Anathema Psykana^^** unit is within 6" of this unit, each time a model in that ^^**Anathema Psykana^^** unit makes an attack, add 1 to the Hit roll.
rules.name: Revered Companions

rules.description: In the Battle-shock step of your opponent's Command phase, if an enemy unit that is either a ^^**Psyker^^** unit or below its Starting Strength is within 12" of one or more ^^**Anathema Psykana^^** models from your army, that enemy unit must take a Battle-shock test. If that unit is below Half-strength, it must subtract 1 from its Battle-shock test this phase instead.
rules.name: Creeping Dread (Aura)

rules.description: At the start of your Command phase, select one unit from your opponent’s army. Until the start of your next Command phase, each time a model in an ^^**Adeptus Custodes Character^^** unit from your army makes an attack that targets that enemy unit, add 1 to the Wound roll.
rules.name: Assemblage of Might

rules.description:
■ While an ^^**Adeptus Custodes Vehicle^^** unit from your army is at Starting Strength, unless that unit is an ^^**Aircraft^^** or it is Battle‑shocked, add 2 to the Objective Control characteristic of models in that unit.

■ While an ^^**Adeptus Custodes Vehicle^^** unit from your army is below Starting Strength, each time a model in that unit makes an attack, re‑roll a Hit roll of 1.

■ While an ^^**Adeptus Custodes Vehicle^^** unit from your army is Below Half‑strength, each time a model in that unit makes an attack, re‑roll a Hit roll of 1 and re‑roll a Wound roll of 1.
rules.name: Auric Armour

rules.description: Add 2" to the Move characteristic of models in ^^**Adeptus Custodes Walker^^** units from your army and add 1 to  Advance and Charge rolls made for such units.
rules.name: Moritoi Ancients

rules.description: Each time an ^^**Adeptus Custodes^^** unit from your army (excluding ^^**Vehicles^^**) makes an attack, if there are no other friendly units within 6" of that unit, add 1 to the Hit roll and add 1 to the Wound roll.
rules.name: Against All Odds
March of the Honoured Dead
rules.description:
Friendly **ADEPTUS CUSTODES WALKER** units: 
- Have +2" **M**. 
- Have +1 to **advance rolls** and **charge rolls**.

rules.name: Skin-crawling Disorientation
rules.description:
- When a friendly **ANATHEMA PSYKANA** unit is selected to make an **advance move**, that **advance move** does not prevent that unit from being **eligible to start an action**.
- Friendly **ANATHEMA PSYKANA** units have the following ability: 
**Ceaseless Vigilance**: In your Shooting phase, this unit can select one **visible** enemy unit within 12". That enemy unit is nulled: 
- While a unit is nulled, that unit has +3" **detection range**.

rules.name: The Hammer Falls
rules.description:
If a friendly **ADEPTUS CUSTODES TERMINATOR** unit made an **ingress move** this turn, that unit can re‑roll **charge rolls**. 


This detachment has the LIONS tag and cannot be taken with another LIONS detachment.

ADEPTUS CUSTODES VEHICLE model only. While a friendly ADEPTUS CUSTODES INFANTRY or ADEPTUS CUSTODES MOUNTED unit is within 6" of the bearer, each time a model in that unit makes  an attack, re‑roll a Hit roll of 1.

characteristics.$text: Complete two battles in which you destroy the three units from your opponent's army with the highest points values (if one or more units are tied in this way, then the destruction of any of them counts towards this Imperative).
characteristics.name: Description

characteristics.$text: Complete two battles in which you earned XP from an **^^Adeptus Custodes^^** Agenda.
characteristics.name: Description

characteristics.$text: Complete two battles in which you earned XP from non-**^^Adeptus Custodes^^** Agendas (such as those found in the main Crusade rules).
characteristics.name: Description

characteristics.$text:
At the end of the battle, both of the following are satisfied:
- You control three or more objective markers.
- You control at least double the number of objective markers that your opponent does.
characteristics.name: Description

characteristics.$text: At the end of a battle, at least twice as many enemy units were destroyed in that battle than units from your Crusade army.
characteristics.name: Description

characteristics.$text: At the end of a battle, the enemy **^^Warlord^^** is destroyed.
characteristics.name: Description

characteristics.$text: At the end of a battle, every enemy unit is destroyed, or is Below Half-strength.
characteristics.name: Description

characteristics.$text: Complete two battles where, at the end of the battle, you have more friendly units wholly within your opponent's deployment zone than enemy units (excluding **^^Aircraft^^**).
characteristics.name: Description

characteristics.$text: Anti-Infantry 4+, Blast, Blinding Light, Devastating Wounds
characteristics.name: Keywords

rules.description: Each time a unit is hit by this weapon, it is blinded until the start of your next turn. While a unit is blinded, each time a model in that units makes an attack, subtract 1 from the Hit roll.
rules.name: Blinding Light

characteristics.$text: Once per battle, at the start of the battle round, the bearer can deploy the Epoch Auspice. If it does, until the end of the battle round, each time an attack targets the bearer's unit, subtract 1 from the Wound roll.
characteristics.name: Description

characteristics.$text: Once per battle, when the bearer is selected to fight, it can activate the Mortis Gyre. If it does, until that fight is resolved, melee attacks made by the model that target an **^^Infantry^^** unit have the **[DEVASTATING WOUNDS]** ability.
characteristics.name: Description

characteristics.$text: Once per battle, at the end of any of your phases, the bearer can use the Twilight Pallium. If it does, remove the bearer's unit from the battlefield and set it up again anywhere on the battlefield more than 3" horizontally away from all enemy units. The bearer's unit is not eligible to charge in a turn in which it was set up in this manner unless it is more than 9" horizontally away from all enemy units.
characteristics.name: Description

characteristics.$text: When an enemy model within 12" of this model makes an attack with a Psychic weapon, subtract 1 from the Wound roll.
characteristics.name: Description

characteristics.$text: Once per battle, in your Command phase, the bearer can regain up to D6 lost wounds.
characteristics.name: Description

characteristics.$text: Enemy units that are set up on the battlefield as Reinforcements cannot be set up within 12" of this unit.
characteristics.name: Description

characteristics.$text: This model can be attached to the following units: ^^**Allarus Custodians**^^
characteristics.name: Description

characteristics.$text: Models in this unit have the Lone Operative ability.
characteristics.name: Description

characteristics.$text: While this model is not leading a unit, each time this model makes a melee attack, you can re-roll the Hit roll and you can re-roll the Wound roll.
characteristics.name: Description

characteristics.$text: While this model is leading a unit, you can re-roll Charge rolls made for that unit.
characteristics.name: Description
Description
characteristics.$text:
This unit’s attacks can: 
- Re‑roll **hit rolls** of 1. 
- Re‑roll **wound rolls** of 1.

characteristics.name: Description
characteristics.$text: When you target this unit with the **Crushing Impact stratagem**, that use is ‑1 **CP**.

sharedRules.description:
Each time a unit with this ability is selected to fight, select one of the Ka'tah stances below. Until that unit has finished making its attacks, the selected Stance is active for it and it gains the relevant ability.

■ DACATARAI STANCE
Melee weapons equipped by models in this unit have the [SUSTAINED HITS 1] ability.
■ RENDAX STANCE
Melee weapons equipped by models in this unit have the [LETHAL HITS] ability.
sharedRules.name: Martial Ka'tah

characteristics.$text: This model has the Feel No Pain 3+ ability against Psychic Attacks and mortal wounds.
characteristics.name: Description

characteristics.$text: Add 1 to the bearer's Wounds characteristic.
characteristics.name: Description

characteristics.$text: Add 1 to the Objective Control characteristic of models in the bearer's unit.
characteristics.name: Description

characteristics.$text: Once per battle round, one unit from your army with this ability can use it when its unit is targeted with a Stratagem. If it does, reduce the CP cost of that use of that Stratagem by 1CP.
characteristics.name: Description
Description
characteristics.$text:
In your Shooting phase, this unit can select one **visible** enemy unit within 12". That enemy unit is **nulled**: 
- While a unit is **nulled**, that unit has +3" **detection range**.
While an ^^**Adeptus Custodes^^** unit is within 6" of this unit, models in that unit have the Feel No Pain 5+ ability against Psychic Attacks and mortal wounds.
characteristics.name: Description

characteristics.$text: While an **^Anathema Psykana^^** unit is within 6" of this unit, each time a model in that ^^**Anathema Psykana^^** unit makes an attack, add 1 to the Hit roll.
characteristics.name: Description
